name: Barbecue-Style Pork Steaks
recipeIngredient: 4 Pork shoulder steaks (cut into 1/2 inch thick slices)
1 large Onion (slice and separate into rings)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the pork steaks in half lengthwise and trim excess fat.
2. In a large skillet, brown the steaks on both sides using hot oil.
3. Drain the steaks on paper towels.
4. Arrange the onion, green pepper, and tomatoes in the bottom of an electric crockpot.
5. Sprinkle tapioca over the vegetables.
6. Place the pork steaks atop the vegetables and tapioca.
7. In a small bowl, stir together the barbecue sauce, red wine, and ground cumin.
8. Pour the mixture over the meat and vegetables in the crockpot.
9. Cover and cook on low-heat setting for 6 to 8 hours or until the meat and vegetables are tender.
10. Serve the meat and vegetables on a platter. Makes 4 to 6 servings.
